narrative:
Union Township I (precinct in Clermont County) has 973 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a clear Republican lean of 11.5 percentage points.
